pl-goals.title: Premier League Goals (since 2012)
pl-goals.hint: Agüero (161) and Vardy (145) drop you fast — save Son (127) or a lower scorer to finish between 0 and −10.

laliga-goals.title: La Liga Goals (since 2012)
laliga-goals.hint: Suárez (176), Benzema (171) and Aspas (169) descend quick — Gerard Moreno (124) and Oyarzabal (100) keep you in control.

seriea-goals.title: Serie A Goals (since 2012)
seriea-goals.hint: Lautaro (132), Dybala (131) and Berardi (130) bring you down — line up a smaller scorer for the checkout.

bundesliga-goals.title: Bundesliga Goals (since 2012)
bundesliga-goals.hint: Kramarić (140) and Reus (120) descend fast — Müller (105) or Werner (102) then a finisher.

ligue1-goals.title: Ligue 1 Goals (since 2012)
ligue1-goals.hint: Ben Yedder (160) and Lacazette (155) drop you quick — Cavani (138), Ibrahimović (113) to close in.

ucl-goals.title: Champions League Goals (since 2012)
ucl-goals.hint: Lewandowski (108) and Ronaldo (102) are the big drops — Messi (78), Mbappé (70) then a low scorer to finish.

pl-assists.title: Premier League Assists (since 2012)
pl-assists.hint: De Bruyne (122) and Salah (98) descend fast — Sterling (86), Eriksen (83) keep you in range.

pl-yellows.title: Premier League Yellow Cards (since 2012)
pl-yellows.hint: Even the worst offenders stay modest — Tarkowski (72), Shaw (71), Xhaka (63) — so this is a patient countdown.

pl-goal-contributions.title: Premier League Goals + Assists (since 2012)
pl-goal-contributions.hint: Lukaku (163) and Mané (158) drop you fast — Mahrez (147), Hazard (146) then a low contributor to finish.

arsenal-goal-contributions.title: Goals + Assists · Arsenal · Premier League
arsenal-goal-contributions.hint: Saka (114) and Giroud (100) are the big drops — Xhaka (41), Rice (38), Havertz (37) close it out.

pl-apps-minus-goals-spain.title: Appearances − Goals · Spanish players · Premier League
pl-apps-minus-goals-spain.hint: Defenders and keepers rack up huge values — Ayoze (178), Bellerín (175) — while forwards like Soldado (45) keep you in checkout range.

seriea-yellow-assists-brazil.title: Yellow Cards + Assists · Brazilian players · Serie A
seriea-yellow-assists-brazil.hint: Danilo (80), Juan Jesus (76) and Allan (73) descend quick — Bremer (44), Hernanes (42) to finish.
